    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    C

    canvas - package canvas
     
    CanvasController - Class in controller
    Controls all canvas interaction: Handles mouse input (press, drag, release) Calls the active brush to paint on CanvasData Redraws pixel buffers onto JavaFX canvas layers Draws cursor previews for the eraser Runs the wiggle animation loop (layer swapping) This controller manages all painting logic between the UI (CanvasPane) and the pixel buffer (CanvasData).
    CanvasController(CanvasPane, CanvasData, BrushController) - Constructor for class controller.CanvasController
    Creates a canvas controller, attaches mouse events, prepares wiggle frames, and registers theme-change listeners.
    CanvasData - Class in canvas
    Stores all pixel data for WigglyPaint's canvas, including the base framebuffer and two animated “wiggle” frames.
    CanvasData() - Constructor for class canvas.CanvasData
    Constructs a new canvas and fills wiggle frames with BG color.
    CanvasDataTest - Class in grader
     
    CanvasDataTest() - Constructor for class grader.CanvasDataTest
     
    CanvasPane - Class in gui
    A multi-layered pixel-art canvas for WigglyPaint.
    CanvasPane() - Constructor for class gui.CanvasPane
    Constructs the multi-layer canvas and prepares scaling, anti-smoothing settings, theme bindings, and initial background.
    clearAll(byte) - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
    Clears all canvas layers to a given color index.
    clearCursor() - Method in class gui.CanvasPane
    Clears the cursor layer (layer3), removing eraser preview outlines.
    close() - Method in class utils.gif.GifSequenceWriter
    Completes the GIF file and closes the underlying writer.
    colorIndex - Variable in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Index into CanvasData color palette.
    computeSize(double) - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Computes the brush size based on movement speed.
    Config - Class in utils.config
    Simple configuration loader for the WigglyPaint application.
    Config() - Constructor for class utils.config.Config
     
    controller - package controller
